name: Fudge Filled Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Line a 12-cupcake tins with paper or foil cupcake liners.
3. In a double boiler over medium heat, melt the chocolate chips, butter, and vanilla extract until smooth.
4. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
5. Beat eggs until frothy using a whisk or electric mixer.
6. Gradually beat in sugar until it dissolves.
7. Gradually add flour to the egg mixture, folding until combined.
8. Fold in the melted chocolate mixture.
9. Fill each cupcake liner about 1/3 full with the batter.
10. Mash together the cream cheese, sugar, and beaten egg until blended.
11. Add the remaining chocolate chips to the cream cheese mixture and stir until well incorporated.
12. Drop a heaping teaspoonful of filling into each cupcake.
13. Cover the filling with another generous spoonful of batter.
14. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
15. Let cupcakes cool completely on a rack before storing in a covered container.
